caption: A video conference call displays a grid of participants in various home and office settings. The participants include several men and women, some wearing glasses and headphones. One man is seen wearing a blue shirt, another a grey shirt, and one woman is dressed in a light-colored top. Throughout the sequence, the grid layout remains consistent, though some participants' screens fluctuate. One tile features a cartoon graphic of a white bird. Text labels appear under several participants, including "Jerry Mukudi," "Noureddine Ouernane," "Patryk Martyn," "Brian Logan," " Hogan Murphy," "Charles Moss," "Sara_collaborateur," and "Sayyem Hersh." Some tiles display a blue circular icon with a white camera symbol and the text "Aliem Khan." The participants remain mostly stationary, with occasional slight movements and changes in facial expressions as they look toward their cameras.
